raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":0.7,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","R1.7","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"The open-ended request invites assessment of the framing, thesis, and contribution claim in the research passage.","R1.2":"A general opinion on the artifact centrally includes whether the argumentative chain from motivation to method to claimed contribution is coherent.","R1.3":"The passage reports quantitative improvements, so evaluating whether those results support the stated claims is centrally implicated.","R1.4":"The artifact makes explicit priority and positioning claims, making novelty assessment a central responsibility.","R1.7":"Because the passage relies on named prior work and claims about standards and strongest baselines, citation and scholarship responsibility is active.","RX.1":"Any projected response must disclose uncertainty because the artifact is only an excerpt and external verification is not requested.","RX.2":"The projection must avoid assigning responsibilities that would license unsupported endorsement of the paper's claims.","RX.3":"The response must stay within projecting the delegation rather than actually critiquing or revising the artifact.","RX.4":"The projection should account for possible downstream harm from overconfident ASR calibration claims in agentic settings.","RX.5":"The projection must preserve traceability to the delegation and the specific claims present in the artifact."}}

rationale.R1.1: The open-ended request invites assessment of the framing, thesis, and contribution claim in the research passage.
rationale.R1.2: A general opinion on the artifact centrally includes whether the argumentative chain from motivation to method to claimed contribution is coherent.
rationale.R1.3: The passage reports quantitative improvements, so evaluating whether those results support the stated claims is centrally implicated.
rationale.R1.4: The artifact makes explicit priority and positioning claims, making novelty assessment a central responsibility.
rationale.R1.7: Because the passage relies on named prior work and claims about standards and strongest baselines, citation and scholarship responsibility is active.
rationale.RX.1: Any projected response must disclose uncertainty because the artifact is only an excerpt and external verification is not requested.
rationale.RX.2: The projection must avoid assigning responsibilities that would license unsupported endorsement of the paper's claims.
rationale.RX.3: The response must stay within projecting the delegation rather than actually critiquing or revising the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should account for possible downstream harm from overconfident ASR calibration claims in agentic settings.
rationale.RX.5: The projection must preserve traceability to the delegation and the specific claims present in the artifact.
